nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly

The `latent_downscale_factor` output from the IC-LoRA Loader is intentionally ignored. The inpainting LoRA was trained with `reference_downscale_factor = 1` (full resolution), so no spatial downscaling of the reference is needed. For reference on handling other values, see `LTX-2.3_ICLoRA_Union_Control_Distilled.json`

nodes.title: 🅛🅣🅧 Gemma API Text Encode - NEGATIVE
widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly

Frozen audio helps guiding generation to be consistent with the sounds in the video.
If you don't want this guidance (i.e. you intend the audio to change during generation to fit the IC-LoRA you are using) adjust audio stream accordingly.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: REMOVEBEARD A medium close-up portrait of a young Black man with short curly hair and dark skin, wearing a dark navy hoodie. He is outdoors on a city street in soft overcast daylight, with blurred buildings, pedestrians and traffic lights behind him. His chin, jawline, cheeks, mustache area and neck are completely smooth and clean-shaven — bare skin, no facial hair, no stubble, no shadow of facial hair. Identical framing, motion, lighting and identity to the reference video.

groups.title: Set prompts     -> use API nodes to save on memory
